content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 5.1.1(ii) WARN — NSCameraUsageDescription is generic ("This app needs camera access.") and NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription is a placeholder ("TODO") with no location feature visible in code (App/Info.plist:8-11; camera use at App/ScannerView.swift:13).
Pierre: Apple rejects apps whose purpose strings don't tell users why a permission is needed, and "TODO" is an instant 5.1.1 rejection. The camera string should reference the document-scanning feature (e.g. "SnapScan uses the camera to scan documents"), and the location string should either be removed — I see no location API usage in the project — or replaced with a specific, feature-tied explanation.
